'''Vesta's spear (bh)''' is a two-handed weapon requiring 75 [[Attack]] to wield, and is purchased from the [[Bounty Hunter Store]] for 300 points.

As with all [[Ancient Warriors' equipment]] from Bounty Hunter, it is initially purchased in inactive form, and must be charged with 5,000,000 coins before it can be used by the player. Upon dying in [[PvP]], the coins used to activate the item are given to the killer, and players are left with the inactive item.

In addition, it can only be used within [[Daimon's Crater]], [[Castle Wars]], [[Clan Wars]], [[Soul Wars]], the [[TzHaar Fight Pit]], and both the [[player-owned house]] and [[Clan Hall]] combat rings; attempting to attack anything outside the listed areas will result in the player being interrupted from doing so.

==Special attack==
[[File:Spear Wall.gif|thumb|250px|A player performing Vesta's spear's special attack.]]
Vesta's spear has a [[special attack]], ''Spear Wall'', that consumes 50% special attack energy and performs an initial hit that deals up to 100% of the player's max hit. After 2 ticks (1.2 seconds), a second hit lands that deals between 50% and 75% of the damage inflicted by the first hit.

In addition, the user becomes immune to melee and ranged attacks for 8 ticks (4.8 seconds). Upon a successful hit, the player's attack delay is reduced by 1 tick.

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 25 March 2026
|update = Easter 2026 & PvP QoL Improvements
|change = * The Vesta's spear (bh) will now block ranged damage as well as melee damage when the special attack is used.
* Bounty Hunter rewards can now be used within the [[TzHaar Fight Pit]] and both the [[player-owned house]] and [[Clan Hall]] combat rings.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 29 January 2025
|update = Bounty Hunter Changes, Collection Log Updates & Emote Improvements
|change = 
* The special attack of Vesta's spear (bh) now reduces the player's attack delay by 1 tick, and the minimum damage amount of the second hit has been increased from 25% to 50%.
* Activating Vesta's spear (bh) now requires only 5 million coins, down from 50 million.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 11 September 2024
|update = Araxxor CAs, Poll 82 Updates & More!
|poll = Poll 82 - Minigame Changes
|change = Bounty Hunter rewards can now be used within [[Castle Wars]], [[Clan Wars]], and [[Soul Wars]].
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 14 June 2023
|update = Ruinous Powers Beta v2
|change = Instead of hitting up to 16 targets in an 8-tile radius, the special attack of Vesta's spear now deals up to 100% of the player's max hit, then between 25% and 75% of the damage inflicted by the first hit two ticks later.
}}
